entry.data:
MOSTLY CLEAR
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS THIS EVENING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 20 PERCENT

SUNNY
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HUMID WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
WEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 20 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
WEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HUMID WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
NORTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH IN THE EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE

MOSTLY CLEAR
HOT
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
LOWS IN THE MID 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
